title: Chapter 386 – Divine Sword Group (2)
content:
Propulsive energy waves detonated beneath Jeong Yeon-shin's feet. He had just unleashed the Radiant Wing Step. His knee strike would be blindingly fast.

The Golden Wing Sect Leader snapped to attention, crossing her hands before her abdomen.

The instant her internal energy weaponry—shaped like a raptor's talons—scattered golden afterimages as they interlocked, Jeong Yeon-shin's knee tore upward through the gap and buried itself between them.

Kwaaaaaaang—!

The ground heaved outward, spraying grayish-white stone powder in every direction.

Some of the finely pulverized dust briefly clumped together in midair before scattering wildly, though the shockwave from that single exchange swallowed everything.

"Can't you feel anything? It should be thicker now."

Jeong Yeon-shin asked.

The Golden Wing Sect Leader's brow furrowed—her first visible reaction. Perhaps the duel was not unfolding as she had anticipated.

"Your energy waves don't accumulate in my body. They dissipate the moment they touch me."

She said.

She was speaking of energy accumulation. Normally, when one repeatedly endures strikes imbued with internal weight technique, the body's interior becomes ravaged. The opponent's energy waves lodge in the acupoints.

This did not apply to the Golden Wing Sect Leader. She countered the dragon's qualities with the Dragon-Slaying Heaven-Treading Technique.

Jeong Yeon-shin gave a slight nod—one weighted with several meanings. His father Jeong Pan Yue's old words flickered through his mind.

—When things reach their extreme, they reverse. When hardship and adversity peak, reversal becomes inevitable, yet your mother… my wife's life ended in agony that would shame legends. Entirely, entirely because of you… I had wanted to give her happiness.

The principle of reversal at the extreme. It would be the decisive key to hunting the Golden Wing Sect Leader today.

"If you treat your body so recklessly, it will become unusable."

She said. She had blocked Jeong Yeon-shin's knee with her crossed arms—a departure from her earlier, purely offensive stance.

Sichuan's foremost beauty had properly deployed a defensive technique.

The significance was enormous. Even though Jeong Yeon-shin's leg bones appeared to have twisted out of place.

The blue flames enveloping the Golden Wing Sect Leader crackled, scattering sparks that floated like feathers. Her protective energy had grown incredibly dense.

A cold smile settled at the corners of Jeong Yeon-shin's eyes.

"Isn't it enough if just my heart remains intact?"

"I worry your heart might be strained as well."

"Your concern is excessive."

Crack—

The dislocated knee wrenched itself back into alignment. Internal energy had bound the surrounding muscles, forcing the broken bone into place.

The mental imagery of his mother, imbued in his primal energy—it had stayed with Jeong Yeon-shin throughout today's battle.

"Dynamic Technique…"

The Golden Wing Sect Leader's eyes widened slightly. While the internal energy operation of peerless masters all borders on the miraculous, the robustness and ceaseless regenerative power of the Radiant Demon Wing Leader's body were unmistakable.

The limitation of being unable to regenerate burst flesh was nothing compared to such formidable strength.

"Did you create it? How did you structure the incantation?"

"Just think of your deceased parents."

The conversation between world-class geniuses obsessed with martial arts was strangely serene. Jeong Yeon-shin spoke again.

He addressed the Golden Wing Sect Leader, who seemed to be pondering his words. Question and answer. Having received precious information, he had something to ask in return.

"Is your Transcendent Martial Art twofold?"

"…Transcendent Martial Art is time. It cannot be twofold. You wouldn't understand."

The Golden Wing Sect Leader—one sleeve cut away earlier, exposing her bare shoulder—answered. Jeong Yeon-shin broadened his vision while keeping her in sight.

The endlessly blue plateau, the mountainside and cave forged by the Golden Wing Sect Leader's vast primal energy and spell power, the sunlight pouring down blue even though it should already be evening beyond these walls.

"Why did you aim the Transcendent Martial Art at people instead of the rain dragon?"

"Because the mortal world is chaotic. Too many times I had to spend the power meant for dragons on strong humans."

Had she recalled an unpleasant memory?

The Golden Wing Sect Leader, brow suddenly furrowed, spread both arms wide.

Bang!

Jeong Yeon-shin was hurled back more than ten zhang through the hazy dust. He planted both legs in the ground. Even properly realigned, it was a knee that had once been shattered.

Faint pain climbed from his feet to his legs, but he first weighed the truth of the Golden Wing Sect Leader's words.

Human sacrifices and plundered dharma treasures. These were the Golden Wing Sect's deeds—all done to open the formation created by the rain dragon.

'The Transcendent Martial Art is likely singular.'

The spirituality residing below his Baihui acupoint whispered the same.

That was enough. Nothing left to be concerned about.

Just as this thought formed—

The Golden Wing Sect Leader's small face swelled rapidly in his vision. The Dragon-Climbing Heaven-Treading Art, virtually teleportation at short range.

The instant her wine-like fragrance struck him, the golden talons sprouting in three streams from each hand elongated like sword blades, warping the atmosphere.

Kuuung—!

The ground buckled beneath them. A cataclysm that bolstered the Golden Wing Sect Leader's footing while wrecking Jeong Yeon-shin's balance.

Kneading space at will with the Transcendent Martial Art, she carved six golden streams into the void. In that fleeting moment, each variation she improvised targeted Jeong Yeon-shin's entire body along trajectories that bent dozens of times over.

Jjeojeojeojeong!

Jeong Yeon-shin's divine sword Remaining Thunder was tangled in the exchange.

Shockwaves erupted from dozens of layers in every direction. His black long robe of heavenly silkworm thread was ripped apart entirely.

The sensation of cloth fragments brushing his skin arrived with the pain.

[You curse me as Sima Evil Path, but.]

"…!"

[I'm the one protecting you. Do you know how many monstrous beings with extraordinary powers have descended on this land since the founding of the country? The rain dragon stands at the pinnacle of those creatures.]

A voice rang from every direction like the Six Harmonies Technique. The ground shook; vegetation and rocks spewed energy waves.

The realm of the Transcendent Martial Art that the Golden Wing Sect Leader had created was answering her.

For the first time, there was emotion. As though she were performing a rite for an equal who would soon die.

Jeong Yeon-shin felt as if the world itself had turned against him.

Wooooong— Kwaaaang!

Every one of her strikes began slicing through instants. The power of her energy waves was truly explosive.

Perhaps she had recognized Jeong Yeon-shin's talent and the potency of the Jeong Family Dynamic Technique through their repeated exchanges. She seemed determined to hold nothing back.

Every strike was an ultimate move. The golden streams flashing like metal formed the bars of a lightning prison. The momentum with which they caged his body and burst his flesh was terrifying. He couldn't properly deflect them.

It was different from before. The number of exchanges climbed rapidly.

One hundred and twenty moves, one hundred and fifty, two hundred… Her movements were swift as a golden pheasant dissolved into light. She gave Jeong Yeon-shin no time to reverse her counters.

Puhwak— Chwaaaak!

Droplets of blood layered in semi-transparent ripples scattered in all directions.

Until Jeong Yeon-shin's voice suddenly rang from every corner.

[Aren't you one of those monstrous beings yourself?]

[What…?!]

The Golden Wing Sect Leader's eyes went wide. Jeong Yeon-shin, reflected in her golden pupils, was clearly not moving his lips.

[You sacrificed the martial artists of Desolate Fortress—including Obeying Heaven Wing Leader—alive in spell formations, and destroyed the homes of common people to dig up dharma treasures. You've committed countless atrocities over the long years. Moreover, when you finally opened the formation you created, the rain dragon had vanished elsewhere.]

The ground spoke. The vegetation and rocks beneath their mounds of dirt echoed the words.

Even the distant cave rumbled with Jeong Yeon-shin's voice.

It was the same as the Golden Wing Sect Leader's technique. Her hands stopped.

"……"

[Even if your excuse lies in a greater cause, you deserve to die.]

Jeong Yeon-shin, gripping his sword, declared.

His appearance.

His long robe was shredded. Blood ran down clearly defined abdominal muscles. The hem of his black martial outfit was soaked pitch-dark with it.

He paid no heed.

He had exchanged enough moves. It was time to end this.

Swish.

He half-closed his eyes, even with a mortal enemy standing before him.

He had closely observed the Golden Wing Sect Leader when she activated the rain dragon's formation.

The way she wielded natural energy—different from the Zhuge Clan Leader. Far more intuitive, far faster. She manipulated the flow of mystical energy with absolute freedom.

He couldn't help but sense that it would harmonize with her martial arts.

Since collision was inevitable, he had to devise a way to break it.

That was why he had bided his time for several days after entering the rain dragon's formation. While refining the incantation for protective energy, he had studied the Golden Wing Sect Leader.

'Breaking it wasn't enough.'

Her martial arts level approached purple without end. She was near perfection as a martial artist.

Impossible to tear down such a thick, vast wall of martial arts with a handful of counters.

He had to properly scale it.

This wasn't a short decisive battle. It was time to deepen the martial arts he possessed.

So he had grasped the Golden Wing Sect Leader's Transcendent Martial Art as it bore down on him.

[Let me ask one thing.]

[How did you…?]

[You said your internal energy subdues all auspicious things in the world.]

[……]

[Could you say the same in front of Bodhidharma and Zhang Sanfeng?]

[What?]

[Implanting the dragon's qualities in me was a mistake.]

Woong—

Jeong Yeon-shin rotated the Luminous Wheel. Something responded at once. The spirituality that completes divine skills and divine martial arts—spiritual energy.

The dragon's qualities the Golden Wing Sect Leader had personally created and implanted were crying out within the Luminous Wheel Energy.

Once it enters the body, everything becomes his. Even spirituality that will linger only briefly before fading.

Earlier, the instant the Transcendent Martial Art deployed, Jeong Yeon-shin had recalled his father Jeong Pan Yue's drunken ramblings about "reversal at the extreme."

What would happen if the dragon's spirituality were added to the Luminous Wheel that Transcends Law? Auspicious energy paired with auspicious spirituality. The material nature would reach its zenith.

He also knew Blood Extreme Demon Jin Myeong-jo—a man who appeared utterly ordinary despite having pushed internal energy cultivation to its extreme.

A state of not extending energy waves. In the martial world, this realm was called "returning to origin at the pinnacle."

Reversal at the extreme and returning to origin at the pinnacle.

They meant one thing.

—Being supremely spiritual, there is no trace.

It was when he first began exchanging moves with the Golden Wing Sect Leader. He had briefly unified the dragon's spirituality with the Luminous Wheel by drawing it in, but she hadn't noticed.

Even when he secretly planted primal energy in the ground with each move he launched, she showed no particular reaction.

Just like the Blood Flame Cult who hadn't realized their formation was being imbued with Buddhist power.

Jeong Yeon-shin finally unleashed the Luminous Wheel that Transcends Law in its entirety.

[This must be what Bodhidharma's Dharma power was like.]

Wooooooong—!

Faintly white ripples began spreading in several layers from beneath his feet—as though white waves had manifested on the ground.

The energy waves drew massive concentric circles, extending even to the Golden Wing Sect Leader's feet without being crushed.

Transparent as the Buddha's breath. Nothing binding it.

"…!"

As her eyes widened, Jeong Yeon-shin triggered the energy he had planted throughout the spell barrier in all directions.

Kuguuuung—

Vibrations raced violently up through his feet.

He didn't know exactly how the Golden Wing Sect Leader's Transcendent Martial Art was structured. It contained mental imagery and years incomparable to even Ghost Cry Hegemon King, the former Peng family head.

That was fine.

It was enough to read the foundation of the spell formation with his intuition and shatter completely the points forming the axis.

So that the Golden Wing Sect Leader, having poured massive energy into the Transcendent Martial Art, could never recover her power.

Bang! Kuguung—! Kwaaang!

The false scenery shattered. The distant cave that had gaped like an enormous mouth collapsed, raining stone fragments, and the impossibly tall trees snapped and crashed to the ground.

Rustle.

The two began walking toward each other through the oncoming dust.

[Our energy levels have become equal.]

Jeong Yeon-shin spoke. While holding onto the dragon's spirituality as it tried to dissipate from his heart.

With each step, white ripples spread in succession from his heel.

The Golden Wing Sect Leader, having spent tremendous internal energy on the Transcendent Martial Art, had lost her absolute advantage. Now she had to compete on skill alone.

Whooooosh—

Wind surged toward her body. Natural energy swirling with a dim golden light. She was preparing an ultimate move she had kept hidden throughout the fight.

The flame-shaped protective energy around her began turning golden.

If the mythical golden phoenix took human form, would it look like that? Even at a glance, the ferocity of her internal energy transcended reason.

'If even a single move lands, it's instant death.'

The time had come. One strike remained.

Through an unusually long exchange of moves since beginning his martial world journey, Jeong Yeon-shin had prepared to hunt the golden phoenix of the martial world.

'Whatever spell technique she uses.'

Crack—… The Luminous Wheel shattered in his heart.

Fragments of light streamed from his body like the Milky Way. Every acupoint and muscle breathed with the incantation of the Myriad Heavens Flower Rain, and instantly a garment woven of light clusters covered his entire body.

Huwook—

By then, the Golden Wing Sect Leader was already swinging both hands down directly before Jeong Yeon-shin.

The golden radiance around her arms had grown closer to massive wings than talons. Space warped violently along the trajectories of both hands.

Their gazes met.

There was no warmth in the Golden Wing Sect Leader's golden eyes. Her look said plainly: no human's protective energy could withstand this.

The time of peerless masters, where an instant stretches without end.

Jeong Yeon-shin glanced upward.

He saw the sky.

It was clear. A false firmament.

It should already be twilight. The night sky should be spread out above.

Wooooong—!

A dragon rose in his mind. The fan-mouthed creature coiled around the starlight enveloping Jeong Yeon-shin like silk robes.

The Fan Dragon Treading Lotus Technique layered itself atop the already deployed protective energy, Precious Radiant Star Heaven. Just for an instant. Light clusters flickering like a dragon's body spread in all directions.

"…!"

The Golden Wing Sect Leader's body, hurtling forward at extreme speed, was lifted into the air. She was enveloped in starlight.

The martial talent that flashed alongside the technique's activation had instantly shattered her sense of balance as if it were his own.

[You said my Myriad Heavens Flower Rain lacked years.]

In that moment, Jeong Yeon-shin's mental imagery resonated far faster than spoken technique.

"You…?!"

The Golden Wing Sect Leader's lips contorted. Her voice collapsed into raw vocalization. Like the world shattering around them into pottery shards.

Saaaa—!

The currents of starlight surrounding them shone faintly white—as if constellations hidden in the blue sky had been pulled down to earth.

At the same time, through the spirituality of the Transcendent Martial Art now under Jeong Yeon-shin's control, his mental imagery flowed outward.

[Your grace compared my children to stars, and that inspiration reached you to become a set of robes… how about Bright Dawn?]

[It doesn't sound very good to me.]

His voice and the Tang Clan Leader's. A conversation they had once shared.

The mental imagery forming the framework of martial arts must ultimately originate from a person's memories.

The ultimate move of Precious Radiant Star Heaven had taken the offensive, and its name was thus. No matter how he pondered, there was only one conclusion.

Too many miscellaneous beings inhabit the martial world. The best protection was to ensure no opponent could harm one's body.

[Bright Dawn.]

Jeong Yeon-shin uttered it simply. Bright dawn. A flash of insight bringing spell techniques he had never formally studied into the realm of martial arts.

Kwaaaaaaaa—

The fragments of protective energy spiraled upward at tremendous length—as though they might reach even the low sky of the Transcendent Martial Art Formation. The Golden Wing Sect Leader's eyes, trapped within, widened in shock.

"No…! It can't be!"

The moment the star cluster surrounding them sparkled in the shape of an ascending rain dragon.

Kwiyuuuuung—!

A dragon ascension made of starlight connected heaven and earth in a single streak.
